INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('f39ea3a8-d0f4-4c74-854a-22fe81c018eb', 'Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The data from the experiments suggest a trend ______ conclusive.', NULL, NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"suggest","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Agreement error: requires \"suggests\"."},{"id":"B","text":"suggests","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Correct (B). Correct verb form \"suggests\"."},{"id":"C","text":"suggesting","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Agreement error: \"suggesting\" does not match."},{"id":"D","text":"have suggested","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Wrong tense: \"have suggested\"."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Step 1 — Identify the subject
The stem tests form structure sense conventions. Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The data from the experimen

Step 2 — Check agreement and form
Compare each option against explicit textual evidence. On medium items, correct answers usually restate the passage faithfully without absolute words the text does not support.

Step 3 — Select the grammatical option
Choice B is correct: suggests.

Distractor analysis:
- A: Agreement error: requires "suggests".
- C: Agreement error: "suggesting" does not match.
- D: Wrong tense: "have suggested".', NULL, 'Standard English Conventions', 'Form, Structure, and Sense', 'reading_writing', 'conventions', 'FSS', NULL, 'medium', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"rw_subtype":"form_structure_sense","rw_format":null,"dsat_blueprint_v1":true,"dsat_topic":"literature","generator":"generate-dsat-rw-bank.mjs","explanation_v2":true,"blueprint_version":"dsat_blueprint_v1","original":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
